response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in open-source projects, but his experience lacks depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, which are critical for this role. His technical leadership and mentoring are evident, but the role's specific technical requirements may not align perfectly with his recent work.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentoring experience through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse experience with distributed systems, real-time data processing, and high-performance applications (e.g., at Dunnhumby and Meta).
Strong problem-solving skills and adaptability, evidenced by contributions across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, and AI-agent infrastructure).
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (only explicitly mentioned at National Instruments, 2014–2015), falling short of the 8-year requirement.
Primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and full-stack development, with less focus on cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture.
Technical leadership roles have been informal (e.g., workshops, open-source) rather than formal team leadership in cloud/DevOps contexts.
